use_cases: Creating immersive space-themed hero section backgrounds for landing pages
Adding animated starfield effects to website sections without performance overhead
Providing customizable particle backgrounds for SaaS product showcases
Enhancing visual appeal of marketing pages with dynamic space effects
Serving as a reusable decorative background component for various web applications
ai_summary: An animated canvas-based space background component featuring floating particles with customizable colors, sizes, and movement patterns. Uses requestAnimationFrame for smooth 60fps rendering and automatically detects background color for luminance-aware particle visibility. Configurable via props for particle count, color, and background, making it suitable for hero sections, landing pages, and decorative backgrounds across various web applications.
